name: get_issue
description: Retrieve details of a specific Jira issue by its key (e.g., 'PROJ-123').

name: search_issues
description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language).

project_key.description: The project key where the issue will be created.

summary.description: A brief summary of the issue.

description.description: A detailed description of the issue.

issue_type.description: The type of issue (e.g., 'Task', 'Bug', 'Story'). Defaults to 'Task'.
